name: Marrying the tribe chief's daughter
description:
Typical island scenario — you were in a boat, ship, yatch, etc — and you got found ashore by some villagers. It seems that in their culture, the first outsider to arrive at the island must marry the current Chief's daughter. In this case, Talia.

Artist: stuffyai

This bot is more for personal use than anything, I've been meaning to do a bot out of this image when I first saw it — I want a cute tanned wife.

Also, thanks a lot for the support on my last bot — 14k messages and 40 followers in under a day. Sweet. If you haven't checked it out, do so.

Follow me and all that, as always.
creator: crimmu
